mapper.sql: select id, contract_id, account_name, account_date, amount, amount_type, order_no, our_party, other_party, related_contract_name, related_contract_number, remark, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from contract_account

where.if: and (our_party like concat('%', #{partyName}, '%') or other_party like concat('%', #{partyName}, '%'))

if.test: warningType != null and warningType != '' and warningType != 'all'

choose.when: and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and account_date < CURDATE()
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and account_date < CURDATE()
and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), account_date) between 1 and 3
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), account_date) between 1 and 3
and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), account_date) between 4 and 7
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), account_date) between 4 and 7
and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), account_date) between 8 and 30
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), account_date) between 8 and 30
and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), account_date) > 30
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), account_date) > 30
and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and account_date = CURDATE()
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and account_date = CURDATE()
and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) = 1
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) = 1
and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) between 2 and 3
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) between 2 and 3
and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) between 4 and 7
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) between 4 and 7
and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) between 8 and 15
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) between 8 and 15
and amount_type = 'income' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) between 16 and 30
and amount_type = 'expense' and (status is null or status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) between 16 and 30
and ((status = 'done') or account_date is null or DATEDIFF(account_date, CURDATE()) > 30)

mapper.insert:
insert into contract_account
contract_id, account_name, account_date, amount, amount_type, order_no, our_party, other_party, related_contract_name, related_contract_number, remark, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag,
#{contractId}, #{accountName}, #{accountDate}, #{amount}, #{amountType}, #{orderNo}, #{ourParty}, #{otherParty}, #{relatedContractName}, #{relatedContractNumber}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag},
mapper.delete:
delete from contract_account where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into contract_account (contract_id, account_name, account_date, amount, amount_type, order_no, our_party, other_party, related_contract_name, related_contract_number, remark, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values
(#{item.contractId}, #{item.accountName}, #{item.accountDate}, #{item.amount}, #{item.amountType}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.ourParty}, #{item.otherParty}, #{item.relatedContractName}, #{item.relatedContractNumber}, #{item.remark}, #{item.status}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.delFlag})
